mapper.insert: INSERT INTO relationship (name, from_model_id, to_model_id, join_type, join_condition, description, workspace_id) VALUES (#{name}, #{fromModelId}, #{toModelId}, #{joinType}, #{joinCondition}, #{description}, #{workspaceId})
mapper.update: UPDATE relationship SET name = #{name}, from_model_id = #{fromModelId}, to_model_id = #{toModelId}, join_type = #{joinType}, join_condition = #{joinCondition}, description = #{description}, workspace_id = #{workspaceId} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM relationship ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM relationship WHERE from_model_id = #{fromModelId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM relationship WHERE to_model_id = #{toModelId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM relationship WHERE workspace_id = #{workspaceId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
